name: X-Golf Rockwall
about: X-Golf Rockwall is an indoor golf simulator venue that offers a state-of-the-art golf experience with precise ball tracking and realistic graphics. The facility is designed for playing, training, and entertaining, featuring simulator bays with real-time shot data, swing analysis, and leaderboard displays. Pricing is based on hourly rates per simulator bay, with the ability to book sessions online or by phone. It is a comprehensive venue catering to individual players, leagues, and various events, emphasizing a combination of high-tech golf simulation with a sports bar atmosphere.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art simulators with precise ball tracking and realistic graphics
Comprehensive real-time shot data, swing analysis, and leaderboard features for a detailed training experience
Flexible booking system with the ability to add extra time to a session
Variety of leagues and event hosting options for both casual and competitive play

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen available with food and drink options.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You do not need to bring your own clubs; rentals are available on-site.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not permitted, as the venue has its own full kitchen and bar.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: 18 holes equal 1 hour of simulator time.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, X-Golf Rockwall is kid-friendly and offers field trip packages and party hosting for children.
